task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the correct coordinates (37.9583, -100.6425) showing a circular field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view centered on a circular irrigation field at the specified coordinates.

task_completion.description: Agent uses a ruler or measurement tool to measure the diameter of the circular field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ruler/measurement tool active on screen, with a line drawn across the diameter of the circle. The measurement display should show a value approximately between 750m and 850m (0.75-0.85km).

task_completion.description: Agent creates a placemark with the specific name 'Pivot Field KC-2847'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Placemark' or 'Properties' dialog box is visible with 'Pivot Field KC-2847' entered in the Name field.

task_completion.description: Agent adds the measured diameter to the placemark description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The placemark dialog's Description field contains text indicating the diameter (e.g., 'Diameter: 800m' or similar numeric value consistent with the measurement step).

task_completion.description: Agent saves the placemark to the correct path and filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the filename 'irrigation_pivot.kml' and the destination folder 'Documents' (or ~/Documents).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI mapping application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble) rather than a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping software with map rendering, not just a code editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the measurement was performed using the software's tools, not guessed or hardcoded.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement/ruler tool interface is visible and active during the workflow.

integrity.description: Verify the output file was not generated via command line shortcuts.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of terminal commands like 'echo ... > file.kml' or scripts creating the file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target coordinates 37.9583, -100.6425 correspond to a circular center-pivot irrigation field in Finney County, Kansas. The standard diameter for this field is approximately 800 meters (0.8 km). The VLM should expect measurement values close to this figure.
